name: Megaventory API
description: A powerful business ERP software API for Inventory and Order Management, Light Manufacturing Management, and Reporting. Megaventory provides endpoints for managing products, sales orders, purchase orders, suppliers/clients, inventory locations, stock levels, and documents.
